# Whitstable Dog Care

Home-from-home, family-run dog day care and boarding in Whitstable, Kent. Dogs only.

## Services & Pricing

| Service                        | Standard Rate | Peak Rate |
|-------------------------------|---------------|-----------|
| Half day care (up to 4 hours) | £20           | £25       |
| Full day care (up to 8 hours) | £30           | £40       |
| Long day care (up to 12 hours)| £40           | £50       |
| Overnight boarding (12–24 hrs)| £50           | £60       |

Peak rates apply to weekend bookings, school holidays, and public holidays.
A 10% discount applies to bookings of 7 days or more.
All prices include walks, enrichment, rest, and regular photo and video updates. No hidden charges.

## Location
Walmer Road, Whitstable, Kent, GB

## Contact
Phone: 07840 469 646
Email: jack@whitstabledogcare.co.uk
Website: https://whitstabledogcare.co.uk

## Hours
Monday–Sunday, 07:30–21:00 (drop-off and collection window)
24-hour overnight boarding available as a service.

## Ratings
5.0 stars · 11 Google reviews
